questions.hindi: तुम आ रहे हो, है ना?
questions.english: You are coming, aren't you?
questions.hint: Use the pattern: Statement + comma + auxiliary verb (opposite polarity) + subject pronoun + ?
questions.explanation: Correct sentence: "You are coming, aren't you?"

questions.hindi: वह नहीं आया, आया ना?
questions.english: He didn't come, did he?

questions.explanation: Correct sentence: "He didn't come, did he?"
